text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and I are on our way back after an
outing when her phone goes off.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is bad, Trainer! This just dropped on a
wrestling site...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ellie Condra is retiring!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Why would she do this?! She still hasn't proven
that she's the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure yet, but... it's a pretty trustworthy fan
site.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I have to check with her myself! The agency she
works with is close by, so let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it hasn't been officially stated, it's unlikely
we'll get an answer even if we ask directly.
However...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I just have to know!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: She's my rival!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm the only one who thinks so... her
performance in the ring is what made me feel that
way!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So I just have to ask!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...All right! Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ellie Condra isn't at her agency. Apparently, she's
training for her next match.

text_block_list.name: Agency Staff
text_block_list.text:
She left to go run by the riverside a bit ago. As
for where she is now... Well...

text_block_list.name: Agency Staff
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe she has any plans to come back
today. She also starts training camp tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Agency Staff
text_block_list.text:
As for information regarding retirement, that
should be made clear at her next match. That's all
I can say, sorry.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Is her next match... a farewell match?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's my rival, I'm also still one of
her fans.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even if I don't really have a choice, it doesn't
make waiting till her next match any easier...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The agency staff say that Ellie Condra has just
left. Given that information...
choice_data_list: Let's see if we can find her!
Let's see if we can catch up to her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Th-that's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: She might still be close, or by the river!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Vámonos, Trainer! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We search until it gets dark, but unfortunately,
we don't find her.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming with me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Even though we didn't find her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems a little down. I think about how to
comfort her, but then I see the look in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even if she gives up on her dream, I'm not givin'
up on mine.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Not just her. Even if every last one of my rivals
throws in the towel...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll keep soarin' no matter what!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll take the passion and courage that all of my
rivals have given me... and turn it into power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's passionate and full of fighting spirit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's true. Something terrible could have forced
her to give up...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We'll find out at the next match! Let's wait until
then!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's really late, huh? Let's go home, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile looks a bit forced, but she's still the
same El Condor Pasa, with her eyes on the future.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! They did say she just left! Maybe we
can catch her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go to the riverside!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make it to the riverside, but Ellie Condra is
nowhere to be seen.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's a little further ahead! I'll check over
that way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We search around the area a bit more, but we
can't find her. It's getting dark out...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Let's try somewhere else!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But we can't give up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ellie Condra said she was gonna prove herself!
Just like me!
choice_data_list: Do you really think she's giving up?
Do you really think she's giving up?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The conviction with which Ellie Condra spoke
when we saw her at the station was certainly no
lie.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right. She said she was gonna be world
champion.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm so curious about her reasons, but I believe
what she said that day!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll just do what I need to do to prove I'm the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I wouldn't say she's gotten over the news,
El Condor Pasa sets off with her eyes on the
future.
